title: New Nostalgia-Fueled Streaming Service Announced
content: Nostalgia has been a big part of the entertainment world for longer than fans can remember, with countless franchises making comebacks and/or releasing brand new series to retread old ground. Keeping this in mind, it should come as no surprise that some streaming services have been capitalizing on this fact.
author: ComicBook

title: Bleach Confirms First Story Details for Anime’s Final Season
content: Bleach: Thousand-Year Blood War is gearing up for its grand finale later this Summer, and the anime has confirmed the first details about what to expect from its final season. Bleach: Thousand-Year Blood War made its debut a few years ago, and fans have been able to enjoy three full seasons of the new anime adapting…
author: ComicBook

title: Mahjong Pros Announces New Distribution Partnership for Manga
content: Mahjong set company Mahjong Pros ' Mahjong Pros Publishing imprint announced on Monday that it is entering a distribution partnership with Pathway Book Service for book fulfillment, warehousing, and retail distribution for its catalogue. It is also partnering with Gazelle Book Services Ltd.
author: ANN

title: JoJo’s Bizarre Adventure: Steel Ball Run Drops New Spin-Off Details
content: The Steel Ball Run recently made headlines for quite a few reasons earlier this year, as the latest season of JoJo’s Bizarre Adventure has spun the heads of anime fans worldwide.
author: ComicBook

title: Re:ZERO Season 4 Reveals Episode 2 Preview Images and Trailer
content: Re:ZERO -Starting Life in Another World- Season 4 has revealed the Episode 2 preview ahead of its April 15, 2026 premiere. Season 4 began on April 8 and ranked first in our first weekly poll of the season .
author: Anime Corner

title: Crunchyroll’s Most Controversial Isekai Shares Major Update
content: The Isekai genre has become a major genre within the anime industry, but this doesn’t mean that every project erupting from this side of the aisle is free from controversy. Ascendance of a Bookworm , for example, recently ran into the ire of anime fans thanks to the use of artificial intelligence with its opening…
author: ComicBook

title: I Was Reincarnated as the 7th Prince Manga Resumes Serialization
content: Kodansha 's Magazine Pocket app posted a new full chapter of Yōsuke Kokuzawa 's manga adaptation of Kenkyo na Circle 's I Was Reincarnated as the 7th Prince so I Can Take My Time Perfecting My Magical Ability light novel series on Saturday. The new chapter marks the return of the manga after its hiatus.
author: ANN

title: We Are Aliens Anime Film's Teaser Unveils Main Cast, Composer
content: Film label NOTHING NEW unveiled on Tuesday the teaser video and teaser visual for the full-length anime film Ware Ware wa Uchūjin ( We Are Aliens ), which it is producing with animator Kōhei Kadowaki .
author: ANN

title: Witch Hat Atelier Releases Opening and Ending Theme Song Videos
content: Witch Hat Atelier released the opening and ending theme song videos on Tuesday. The opening theme song “Kaze no Anthem” is performed by Eve feat. suis from Yorushika while the ending theme song “Tada Utsukushii Noroi” is performed by Nakamura Hak.
author: Anime Corner

title: 'Wareware wa Uchuujin' Reveals Main Cast, Additional Staff, Teaser Trailer
content: The official X (formally Twitter) of the Wareware wa Uchuujin ( We Are Aliens ) revealed the main cast, additional staff, teaser visual (pictured right) and teaser trailer on Tuesday. The film is scheduled to premiere in Japanese theaters in 2026. Cast Tsubasa: Ryota Bando ( Fureru.
author: MyAnimeList
